flagshipProjects.title: Flagship Projects
flagshipProjects.subtitle: Production-grade systems built from the ground up, with full technical documentation

projects.title: Mail Pilot
projects.description: An AI-native email client where you control everything through natural language. The AI assistant navigates views, filters threads, composes replies, searches your inbox, and manages labels, while a human-in-the-loop approval system guards every action.
features: AI-powered email management — navigate, filter, compose, reply, search, and delete through natural language
Human-in-the-loop approval — confirm or reject every send/delete with a modal dialog
Tool-based AI architecture with typed, validated tools for deterministic behavior
Rich email UI with virtualized thread lists, TipTap rich-text editor, and Gmail label management
File reasoning — upload PDFs, text files, and CSVs; the AI reads and reasons about their content
Resume-to-job matching — upload a résumé and job listings, the AI ranks and drafts personalized applications
projects.stats: 9 doc categories • 25+ architecture docs • Live demo

projects.title: Quartermaster
projects.description: A conversational AI agent that lets a kirana store owner run their entire business through Telegram in plain language. Billing, inventory, khata, GST invoices, analytics, and reminders — all through chat, no web app needed.
features: Multi-turn draft billing with GST computation
Inventory management with automatic HSN/GST lookup
Customer credit ledger (khata) with auto-reminders
GST-compliant PDF invoices with CGST/SGST breakout
Sales analytics and velocity-based reorder suggestions
Scheduled reminders for weekly reports and stock checks
projects.stats: 21 doc pages • 26 tools • 8 modules • Live Telegram bot

projects.title: Aegis
projects.description: A dual-mode AI framework that lets you query and debug production systems using natural language. Connect databases, logs, and infrastructure — ask questions in plain English, get answers with code, charts, and actionable insights.
features: Natural Language Queries translated to SQL, CloudWatch, and APIs
Multi-Source Correlation across PostgreSQL, CloudWatch Logs, and IP geolocation
Defense-in-Depth Sandboxing: Docker → iptables → NSJail → seccomp
Real-Time Streaming via Server-Sent Events
Dual Deployment: FastAPI chatbot or FastMCP server
Production Debugging with 4-phase investigation framework
projects.stats: 13 architecture docs • 12 design patterns • 4 security layers

projects.title: Stardust.app
projects.tagline: Container provisioning engine on AWS Spot Instances
projects.description: A complete container deployment platform that takes you from a GitHub repository to a running container on AWS — with real-time monitoring, SSH access, and disaster recovery. Built on Spot Instances with on-demand fallback.
features: One-click deploy from any GitHub repository
Automatic Docker image building on EC2 builder instances
Spot Instance orchestration with on-demand fallback
Real-time log streaming via SSE and WebSocket SSH
Webhook-triggered rebuilds on git push
Container checkpointing and spot termination handling
projects.stats: 6 microservices • 27 doc pages • IaC with Pulumi

projects.title: WatchWithMe
projects.description: Real-time watch party platform (Web & Mobile). Scaled to 7,000+ users with paying customers. Built synchronized playback using WebSockets, integrated voice & video chat, and solved hard latency, drift & onboarding challenges.

projects.title: Artemis
projects.description: Personal AI OS presented at Chennai Web Conf (Dec 2025). Integrates task management, note-taking, reminders, and Perplexity-powered research with voice interaction and calendar sync.

projects.title: Job Genie
projects.description: AI-powered toolkit designed to help job seekers apply smarter, not harder. Includes tools for generating personalized cover letters, email builder, and resume optimization for senior roles.
